name: @matchbox/soc
description: MatchBox Home SOC — npm workspaces root for the MCP servers and dashboard
//workspaces: Order matters for 'build': mcp-shared must compile before its consumers. npm runs --workspaces in package-graph order, and the shared package is declared first.
//overrides: Force a single Vite 6 across the tree. vitest would otherwise hoist its own Vite 5 to the root, leaving two Vite copies whose Plugin types are nominally incompatible — which breaks svelte-check (dual @sveltejs/vite-plugin-svelte plugin identity).
